text:
Created attachment 189177
Part 2 - Add WAYLAND option

Let's add missing deps and IGNORE, assuming other drivers don't use Wayland. 10.3 i386/amd64, 11.1 i386/amd64, 12.0 amd64 are green. 11.1 aarch64/armv6, 12.0 aarch64/armv6/armv7 hit IGNORE e.g.,

=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
===>  mesa-dri-17.3.1_1 option WAYLAND is only valid on platforms with Vulkan.
*** Error code 1
